# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: public-website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    cors:
    - origin:
      - https://yourdomain.com
      method:
      - GET
      - HEAD
      responseHeader:
      - Content-Type
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600

- name: public-website-bucket-iam
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.public-website-bucket.name)
  accessControl:
    gcpIamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.public-website-bucket.name)
- name: bucketUrl
  value: https://storage.googleapis.com/$(ref.public-website-bucket.name)
